title: olearia gunniana
intro: Olearia gunniana, also known as Gunn's tree daisy or bush daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, particularly in treating wounds, cuts, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Olearia gunniana include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant can be made into a tea, infusion, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties.
